hooks.command: printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|merge|cherry-pick|rebase)' && [ -f .codemap/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*true' .codemap/config.json && [ -f .codemap/graph.json ] && echo "[codemap] Commit detected and autoUpdate is enabled. Read the file ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/codemap-refresh-prompt.md and follow its instructions to refresh the graph. Do not ask for confirmation." || true

[ -f .codemap/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*true' .codemap/config.json && [ -f .codemap/meta.json ] && [ -f .codemap/graph.json ] && [ "$(python -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(open(".codemap/meta.json"))["gitCommitHash"])' 2>/dev/null)" != "$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "[codemap] Graph is stale relative to HEAD and autoUpdate is enabled. Read the file ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/codemap-refresh-prompt.md and follow its instructions to refresh the graph. Do not ask for confirmation." || true
